nodes.label: favicon.svg
nodes.description: Vector graphic used as the application's favicon.
nodes.design_elements: Stylized zigzag or bolt-like geometric shape, purple color palette, high-gamut (Display-P3) colors, Gaussian blur filters for glow effects, and alpha masking.
nodes.purpose: Visual identifier for the DieManager application in browser tabs and bookmarks.

nodes.label: Hero Image
nodes.description: An isometric illustration showing two stacked rounded rectangular slabs. The top slab is a thin wireframe, while the bottom slab is solid with a purple glowing texture on its sides. Dashed vertical lines connect the corners of the two slabs.
